While staying at a lovely Airbnb in the area, I went for a morning walk around lake Merritt. Sadly, the Canadian Geese have made the trail around into a poop-infested minefield. The lake itself is, I believe, a former bog...and smells like it if the breeze is coming your way. Many people taking a pleasant stroll, and I got my morning steps in. But not an ideal place for a walk (especially with kids.)
It’s a beautiful and long standing lake. Unfortunately lots of garbage everywhere and it needs a facelift to bring it back to a good standard.
